/usr/bin/gcc -fPIC -Wall -g -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L -D_XOPEN_SOURCE=700 -D_GNU_SOURCE -shared -Wl,-soname,libosal.so -o libosal.so CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/ipc/osal_atomic.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/ipc/osal_cond.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/ipc/osal_mutex.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/ipc/osal_semaphore.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/ipc/osal_shm.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/ipc/osal_shm_cache.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/lib/osal_errno.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/lib/osal_heap.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/lib/osal_stdio.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/lib/osal_string.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/net/osal_socket.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/net/osal_termios.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/sys/osal_clock.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/sys/osal_env.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/sys/osal_file.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/sys/osal_process.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/sys/osal_sched.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/sys/osal_select.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/sys/osal_signal.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/sys/osal_thread.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/sys/osal_time.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/util/osal_log.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/posix/util/osal_version.c.o CMakeFiles/osal.dir/src/common/osal_version.c.o  -lpthread -lrt -lm
